# Volley Drills

> Beach volleyball personal training app -- structured session planning, courtside run mode, and rules-based adaptation for self-coached amateurs.

## Use This Summary For

- ultra-fast repo orientation
- cold starts when you want the smallest useful context set
- discovering the canonical doc entrypoints before loading deeper files

## Not For

- exhaustive machine routing or dependency traversal
- replacing `docs/catalog.json` as the canonical machine index
- replacing `AGENTS.md` as the prose repo contract

## Stage

Planning / docs-first. No approved implementation yet. Active milestone: M001 Solo Session Loop.

## Stack

Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind + PWA + Dexie (IndexedDB). Local-first, no backend.

## Agent entry points

- AGENTS.md: Repo orientation, source-of-truth hierarchy, routing rules, operating contract
- docs/catalog.json: Machine-readable index of all docs, update routing, research routing, task contract
- agent-manifest.json: Pure JSON cold-start payload (no markdown parsing needed)
- docs/ops/agent-documentation-contract.md: Canonical contract for agent-facing docs, machine-scannable patterns, and change propagation
- llms.txt: This lightweight summary for fast orientation

## Read order (cold start)

1. AGENTS.md
2. docs/catalog.json
3. docs/vision.md (product principles P1-P10)
4. docs/decisions.md (decided D*, open O*, ruled-out)
5. docs/prd-foundation.md (scope, workflow, object model)
6. docs/roadmap.md (phase sequencing, exit criteria)
7. docs/research/README.md (research routing)

## Key docs

- docs/vision.md: Product principles (P1-P10), strategic stance, local-first doctrine
- docs/decisions.md: All decisions (D*), open questions (O*), ruled-out items
- docs/prd-foundation.md: Scope, workflow, object model, drill metadata, MVP requirements
- docs/roadmap.md: Phase sequencing, exit criteria, validation experiments
- docs/milestones/m001-solo-session-loop.md: Current thin-slice scope
- docs/specs/: Milestone-level behavior specs (session assembly, run flow, review, adaptation, home/sync, quality/testing)
- docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-11-v0-prototype-ladder-design.md: V0 stage naming, prototype ladder, and gate logic for validation vs first build

## Discovery and validation

- docs/discovery/phase-0-readiness-assessment.md: Validation readiness state, prototype build plan, gaps — READ FIRST for validation work
- docs/discovery/phase-0-wedge-validation.md: Scorecards, validation program, decision gate
- docs/discovery/phase-0-interview-guide.md: Interview scripts, evidence capture

## Research

- docs/research/beach-training-resources.md: Competitive landscape, periodization, drill families, metrics
- docs/research/outdoor-courtside-ui-brief.md: Outdoor UI defaults, contrast, touch targets
- docs/research/local-first-pwa-constraints.md: iPhone/PWA constraints, storage, service workers
- docs/research/courtside-timer-patterns.md: Timer UX, countdown, interruption recovery
- docs/research/dexie-schema-and-architecture.md: Dexie schema, migrations, IndexedDB
- docs/research/m001-testing-quality-strategy.md: Test layers, trust invariants

## Agent infrastructure

- ops/agent/: Task queue, handoffs, schemas, run artifacts
- ops/agent/schemas/task.schema.json: Task shape (JSON Schema)
- ops/agent/schemas/status-enums.json: All status vocabularies
- ops/agent/queue/task-template.json: Task template
- scripts/: Supervisor, dispatch, verify, agent-doc validation, control-plane validation (bash)
- .cursor/rules/: Cursor rules (repo-operating-model, docs-editorial-workflow, machine-scannable-docs)

## Change propagation

- Add or rename a canonical doc: update docs/catalog.json first, then sync agent-manifest.json and any affected route hints in AGENTS.md or llms.txt.
- Change repo read order or agent entry surfaces: update AGENTS.md, docs/catalog.json, agent-manifest.json, llms.txt, and any affected Cursor rules in the same pass.
- Change durable doc conventions: update docs/ops/agent-documentation-contract.md, docs/catalog.json, and .cursor/rules/machine-scannable-docs.mdc.

## Conventions

- All docs under docs/ use YAML frontmatter (id, title, status, stage, type, summary, authority, depends_on)
- Stable IDs: P1-P10 (principles), D* (decisions), O* (open questions), R* (requirements)
- Source-of-truth hierarchy: vision > decisions > PRD > roadmap > milestones > specs > research > ops
- Raw research in research-output/ (provenance, do not edit); curated findings in docs/research/

## Constraints

- Docs-first until milestone approved for implementation
- Bounded agent autonomy: one task, explicit scope, verification commands, escalation triggers
- Terminal states: done, blocked, failed, budget_exhausted
- WSL-first workspace (bash, python3 for JSON manipulation)
- Cursor-first orchestration; Claude Code as optional unattended worker
